{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324014509D2F896826DEDB6BFC724"}"},"total":4512},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7459278959060353854","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"辉煌的世界观设定，无女主无暧昧，主角性格很赞，挂很大很舒适没有压制，也没有崩战力，节奏也在掌控中的快速，尤其是一个个命运节点做出最大化利益的选择，剧情推进波澜起伏尽在掌握，很有一种史诗化的爽感。

不知道怎么用语言形容，难得一篇无任何毒点的、带脑、开挂升级流、在能力范围内搅动最大的风浪、料到一切的那种程度的爽文。

就是真的太少了[捂脸]，完全不够看，作者加油更新啊[求爆更][求爆更][求爆更]
五星好评！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736751108,"group_id":"7436753329314597912","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8bETBkRjt5wD0VqUWuFzL0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fdb750b326d5498d8d993923852930ed~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776878003&x-signature=rXzqU2%2Bwd9KPx6EQs1HCfYGaxt4%3D","user_id":"896814424802144","user_name":"星星🌟点灯★"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"896814424802144","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7436753329314597912","book_info":{"abstract":"【非传统网游+等级一亿+绝望+优雅+史诗+世界观宏大+独狼+剧情流+单刷横推】
